faqs.question: What types of fly infestations do you treat in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: We handle all fly species common to New Hyde Park including house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, and cluster flies. Our technicians identify the specific species affecting your property and apply targeted treatments to eliminate the infestation at its source.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a fly problem in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to New Hyde Park residents and businesses. Fly infestations can escalate quickly, especially in warmer months, so we prioritize rapid response to prevent the problem from spreading throughout your property.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 fly control service include?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of breeding sites, professional-grade treatments, sanitation recommendations, and follow-up support. Pricing depends on property size, infestation severity, and the type of flies present. We provide detailed estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are your fly control treatments safe for New Hyde Park homes with children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our certified technicians.
